testcase.name: test_database_name_from_env

failure.message: AssertionError: False is not true : Unexpected database name: file:memorydb_default?mode=memory&cache=shared

testcase.failure:
self = <config.tests.test_config.EnvironmentVariableTests testMethod=test_database_name_from_env>
def test_database_name_from_env(self): """Test POSTGRES_DB is loaded from environment.""" db_name = settings.DATABASES['default']['NAME'] > self.assertTrue( db_name == 'habit_tracker_db' or db_name == 'test_habit_tracker_db', f"Unexpected database name: {db_name}", ) E AssertionError: False is not true : Unexpected database name: file:memorydb_default?mode=memory&cache=shared
config/tests/test_config.py:37: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_allowed_hosts_include_platform_host_env_vars
testcase.failure:
monkeypatch = <_pytest.monkeypatch.MonkeyPatch object at 0x73f95b81bb60>
def test_allowed_hosts_include_platform_host_env_vars(monkeypatch): """Ensure platform-provided host env vars are appended to default hosts.""" host_values = { 'WEBSITE_HOSTNAME': 'web.example.com', 'CONTAINER_APP_HOSTNAME': 'container.example.com', 'HOSTNAME': 'runtime-host', }
project_settings = importlib.import_module('config.settings')
with monkeypatch.context() as m: m.delenv('DJANGO_ALLOWED_HOSTS', raising=False) for env_name, env_value in host_values.items(): m.setenv(env_name, env_value)
reloaded_settings = importlib.reload(project_settings)
for env_value in host_values.values(): assert env_value in reloaded_settings.default_allowed_hosts > assert env_value in reloaded_settings.ALLOWED_HOSTS E AssertionError: assert 'web.example.com' in ['localhost', '127.0.0.1', '0.0.0.0'] E + where ['localhost', '127.0.0.1', '0.0.0.0'] = <module 'config.settings' from '/home/kari/source code/habit-tracker-monorepo/backend/config/settings.py'>.ALLOWED_HOSTS
config/tests/test_settings.py:22: AssertionError
